candidate_llm_application: BOGOLAN-NEGATIVE — rank-1 sign-NEGATIVE LoRA adapter that subtracts a learned 'undesired' direction from base model weights: ΔW = -α · v · v^T · W_base. The direction v is computed as the mean activation difference between contrastive sample sets (undesired vs desired generations) and projected into the null-space of in-task signal directions via Gram-Schmidt. Trained with KL-regularization to preserve base behavior while ablating the v direction. Used to subtract undesired behaviors (toxicity, bias, refusal-prone direction) rather than add new capability.
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.title: LoRA-Null 2503.02659 — null-space init from pre-trained activation; preserves knowledge
results.rationale: LoRA-Null 2503.02659 IS the null-space-projection-of-LoRA-onto-pre-trained-activation construction the candidate names — its activation-null-space-init mechanism is precisely the candidate's 'v ∈ null-space of currently-active task directions' projection step, just framed as preserving knowledge instead of preserving in-task signal. Functional-twin on the null-space-of-activation projection for LoRA + KL-style preservation framing; semantic-twin on the LoRA-null-space terminology. The candidate's null-space projection of v_undesired onto the orthogonal complement of v_task is the same activation-null-space-projection LoRA-Null already operationalizes; the sign-negative wrapping is a re-labeling of which side of the subspace receives the adapter.

results.title: LoRA Subtraction Drift-Resistant 2503.18985 — sign-negative subtraction for drift-resistance
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN on the sign-NEGATIVE LoRA subtraction mechanism. LoRA Subtraction 2503.18985 IS the candidate's ΔW = -α · v · v^T · W_base sign-negative subtraction adapter — the paper's drift-resistant subtractive LoRA is the same sign-negative rank-low outer-product subtraction the candidate names, with the only delta being which direction is subtracted (drift direction vs undesired direction). Keyword overlap on 'subtractive negative-projection LoRA adapter' and 'sign-negative learned-undesired direction patch' (kw_count = 2). Functional-twin on the sign-negative LoRA subtraction primitive; semantic-twin on the LoRA-subtraction sign-negative framing. The candidate's claimed sign-NEGATIVE rank-1 outer-product adapter is the exact construction LoRA Subtraction already deploys.

results.title: Analysing Steering Vector Pitfalls 2603.24543 — directional ablation as mitigation
results.rationale: Analysing Steering Vector Pitfalls 2603.24543 supplies the directional-ablation-as-mitigation paradigm the candidate names — its directional ablation IS the candidate's v_undesired direction-subtraction mechanism. The paper's analysis of directional-ablation pitfalls (including the need to project orthogonal to task directions to avoid degradation) directly anticipates the candidate's null-space-of-task-signal projection step. Functional-twin on the directional ablation + task-preservation projection; semantic-twin on the directional-ablation-as-mitigation framing. The candidate's KL-regularized loss to preserve base behavior + ablate v is the standard task-preserving directional-ablation regime this work characterizes.

results.title: COSMIC Refusal Direction Findings ACL 2025 — negative steering subtracts refusal direction
results.rationale: COSMIC Refusal Direction ACL 2025 IS the candidate's sign-negative direction-subtraction-via-mean-activation-difference construction — its negative steering to subtract a refusal direction is the exact v_undesired = mean(undesired) - mean(desired) + sign-negative-apply pipeline the candidate names, just with the refusal axis as the specific undesired direction. Keyword overlap on 'sign-negative learned-undesired direction patch' and 'resist-dye direction-negation null-space' (kw_count = 2). Functional-twin on the contrastive-mean-difference + sign-negative apply; semantic-twin on the negative-steering-subtracts-undesired-direction framing. The candidate's v from contrastive sample sets is the standard refusal-direction-from-contrastive-prompts protocol COSMIC already operationalizes.

results.title: One-Shot Optimized Steering 2502.18862 — steering vector + negation suppresses unsafe behavior
results.rationale: One-Shot Optimized Steering 2502.18862 IS the candidate's optimized-steering-vector + negation construction — its steering vector + negation to suppress unsafe behavior is the same v_undesired + sign-negative-apply pipeline the candidate names, with one-shot optimization of the steering vector being a tighter form of the candidate's contrastive-mean-difference v_undesired computation. Keyword overlap on 'sign-negative learned-undesired direction patch' and 'subtractive negative-projection LoRA adapter' (kw_count = 2). Functional-twin on the optimized-direction + sign-negative-suppression; semantic-twin on the steering-vector-negation suppresses-unsafe-behavior framing. The candidate's α tuning during FT is the standard scalar-optimization of the steering coefficient this work already operationalizes.

results.title: Dataset Corruption Steering Mitigation 2603.03206 — projection-based mitigation
results.rationale: Dataset Corruption Steering Mitigation 2603.03206 supplies the projection-based-mitigation paradigm the candidate names — its projection-based subtraction of a corruption direction is the exact projection-style direction-removal the candidate's v · v^T · W_base outer-product subtraction implements. The paper's projection-based mitigation IS the rank-1 projector P = v · v^T applied with negative sign to remove the v direction from the weight/activation space. Functional-twin on the projection-based direction-removal mitigation; semantic-twin on the projection-mitigation framing. The candidate's outer-product v · v^T is the standard rank-1 projector this work already deploys for direction-subtraction mitigation.

results.title: Safe LoRA 2405.16833 — project LoRA weights to safety-aligned subspace
results.rationale: Safe LoRA 2405.16833 IS the project-LoRA-weights-to-safety-aligned-subspace construction the candidate names — its safety-subspace projection is the dual of the candidate's null-space-of-task projection: Safe LoRA projects onto the safety-preserving subspace, the candidate projects onto the orthogonal complement of the task subspace, and these are the same Gram-Schmidt-style subspace-projection of LoRA weights operation framed from opposite sides. Functional-twin on the LoRA-weight subspace-projection for safety/preservation; semantic-twin on the project-LoRA-to-aligned-subspace framing. The candidate's KL-regularized null-space projection is the same projected-LoRA-into-safety-subspace mechanism Safe LoRA operationalizes.

results.title: OPLoRA 2510.13003 — double-sided orthogonal projection
results.rationale: OPLoRA 2510.13003 IS the double-sided orthogonal-projection-of-LoRA-weights construction the candidate names — its orthogonal projection of LoRA weights onto a task-preserving subspace is the exact null-space-of-in-task-signal projection step the candidate's Gram-Schmidt v projection implements. The double-sided form means both left and right factors are projected, which is a strictly stronger version of the candidate's single-sided v · v^T projector. Functional-twin on the orthogonal-projection-of-LoRA-weights + task-preservation; semantic-twin on the orthogonal-projection LoRA framing. The candidate's null-space-projection of the outer-product direction is a single-sided special case of OPLoRA's double-sided orthogonal projection.

reason: All 8 results trigger hit under sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7, with 3 additionally triggering kw>=2. The candidate decomposes exhaustively across three prior-art clusters: (cluster A — sign-NEGATIVE direction subtraction via LoRA / steering) LoRA Subtraction 2503.18985 (kw=2, sem 0.91, func 0.90) IS the candidate's sign-negative rank-low LoRA subtraction adapter; COSMIC Refusal Direction ACL 2025 (kw=2, sem 0.89, func 0.88) IS the contrastive-mean-difference + sign-negative-apply pipeline for direction subtraction; One-Shot Optimized Steering 2502.18862 (kw=2, sem 0.88, func 0.86) IS the optimized-steering-vector + negation construction; Analysing Steering Vector Pitfalls 2603.24543 (sem 0.84, func 0.83) characterizes the directional-ablation-as-mitigation paradigm with task-preservation analysis. (cluster B — null-space / orthogonal-subspace projection of LoRA weights for task preservation) LoRA-Null 2503.02659 (sem 0.86, func 0.82) IS the null-space-init-from-pre-trained-activation projection; Safe LoRA 2405.16833 (sem 0.83, func 0.81) IS the project-LoRA-weights-to-safety-aligned-subspace dual; OPLoRA 2510.13003 (sem 0.85, func 0.84) IS the double-sided orthogonal-projection of LoRA weights — a strictly stronger version of the candidate's single-sided projector. (cluster C — projection-based mitigation of undesired direction in weight/activation space) Dataset Corruption Steering Mitigation 2603.03206 (sem 0.81, func 0.79) IS the rank-1 projector P = v · v^T applied with negative sign to remove the v direction. The four claimed contributions — (a) rank-1 sign-NEGATIVE outer-product LoRA adapter, (b) v from contrastive mean-activation-difference, (c) null-space-of-task projection of v, (d) KL-regularized FT to preserve base behavior — are anticipated cluster-by-cluster: (a) by LoRA Subtraction + COSMIC + One-Shot Steering; (b) by COSMIC + One-Shot Steering; (c) by LoRA-Null + Safe LoRA + OPLoRA; (d) by Steering Vector Pitfalls + Safe LoRA. The Bambara Bogolanfini mud-cloth / fermented-mud-resist-dye / n'gallama-leaf cultural framing supplies only narrative for the subtractive-direction-via-projection framing; the underlying mechanism is fully covered. total_hits = 8 >> 1, kw_hits = 3, distinct_effect_clusters = 3 >> 1, candidate FAILS.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. BOGOLAN-NEGATIVE is fully anticipated by the conjunction LoRA Subtraction 2503.18985 + COSMIC Refusal Direction ACL 2025 + One-Shot Optimized Steering 2502.18862 + LoRA-Null 2503.02659 + Safe LoRA 2405.16833 + OPLoRA 2510.13003, with Steering Vector Pitfalls 2603.24543 + Dataset Corruption Mitigation 2603.03206 supplying additional theoretical/projection substrate. Specifically: (1) the sign-NEGATIVE rank-1 outer-product ΔW = -α · v · v^T · W_base IS the LoRA Subtraction 2503.18985 sign-negative subtractive LoRA verbatim, with COSMIC and One-Shot Optimized Steering supplying the contrastive-mean-difference + negation pipeline; (2) the v ∈ null-space of in-task signal projection is the LoRA-Null 2503.02659 null-space-init scheme + OPLoRA's double-sided orthogonal projection + Safe LoRA's projection-to-aligned-subspace, all of which implement the same Gram-Schmidt-style task-preserving subspace projection of LoRA weights; (3) the v from contrastive sample sets (undesired vs desired) is the standard refusal-direction-from-contrastive-prompts protocol COSMIC already operationalizes; (4) the KL-regularized FT to preserve base behavior while ablating v is the standard task-preserving directional-ablation regime characterized by Steering Vector Pitfalls and operationalized by Safe LoRA; (5) the projection-via-outer-product v · v^T is the rank-1 projector Dataset Corruption Mitigation already deploys for direction-subtraction mitigation. The candidate's claimed novelty 'explicit sign-NEGATIVE rank-1 outer-product adapter + direction-ablation interpretation for undesired-behavior subtraction' is the literal LoRA Subtraction 2503.18985 contribution composed with COSMIC's contrastive-direction-extraction protocol. To salvage, the candidate would need a feature uniquely supplied by the Bogolan source not anticipated by these clusters, e.g.: (a) a 'fermented-mud-time-fix' operationalized as an adaptive α(t) schedule whose magnitude depends on a corpus-specific 'fermentation' age statistic of the contrastive prompts with a provable irreversibility property beyond LoRA Subtraction's static α; (b) an 'n'gallama-leaf brown-fix chemistry' operationalized as a non-linear binding kernel K(v_undesired, W_base) where the projection is mediated by a learned tannin-style chemical-affinity matrix that creates differential binding rates across weight matrices — beyond OPLoRA's symmetric orthogonal projection; (c) a 'negative-space pattern emergence' formal lower bound on the un-touched (un-ablated) capability subspace volume as a function of the v_undesired rank — beyond Safe LoRA's safety-subspace-only guarantee; (d) a 'women-applied pattern reverse' operationalized as a role-asymmetric adapter where the v subtraction direction is determined by a multi-actor consensus protocol on the contrastive sample sets, with formal Byzantine-robustness for the direction estimation — beyond COSMIC's single-estimator contrastive direction. As stated, BOGOLAN-NEGATIVE is in the saturated region documented by LoRA Subtraction 2503.18985 + COSMIC ACL 2025 + One-Shot Steering 2502.18862 + LoRA-Null 2503.02659 + Safe LoRA 2405.16833 + OPLoRA 2510.13003 + Steering Vector Pitfalls 2603.24543 + Dataset Corruption Mitigation 2603.03206, with each of the four claimed contributions anticipated by at least two prior-art clusters.
